name: Nightjar Verify
tagline: Mathematical proof for AI-generated Python code — not just tested, proved
description:
Nightjar goes beyond vulnerability scanning. It mathematically proves your AI-generated code satisfies its specification using Dafny formal verification, Hypothesis property-based testing, and CrossHair symbolic execution. Found 74 confirmed bugs across 34 popular Python packages including web3.py ENS hijacking, RestrictedPython RCE, and pydantic validator bypass. Zero false positives.

Built after the OpenClaw security incidents: 8 CVEs in 30 days, 341 malicious ClawHub skills, 42,000 exposed instances with auth bypass. Those bugs all shared one root cause — code was never formally verified against its specification. Nightjar closes that gap.

permissions.bash: Required to run `nightjar verify`, `nightjar scan`, `nightjar audit`, and `nightjar explain` CLI commands as subprocesses
permissions.filesystem: Reads .card.md spec files and Python source files in the project directory. Does not write files except when bootstrapping a new spec via `nightjar init` or `nightjar scan`.
permissions.env: Reads NIGHTJAR_MODEL (LLM model name) and NIGHTJAR_AUTO_VERIFY (opt-in auto-verify flag)

auto_trigger.description: Automatically activates after writing a .py file when NIGHTJAR_AUTO_VERIFY=1 is set and a matching .card.md spec exists

commands.name: nightjar verify
commands.description: Run 5-stage verification pipeline against a .card.md spec

commands.name: nightjar scan
commands.description: Scan a Python file or directory and generate a .card.md spec

commands.name: nightjar infer
commands.description: Infer contracts via LLM + CrossHair symbolic execution

commands.name: nightjar init
commands.description: Scaffold an empty .card.md spec for manual editing

commands.name: nightjar audit
commands.description: Scan a PyPI package for contract coverage, outputs letter-grade report

commands.name: nightjar explain
commands.description: Show last verification failure in human-readable form with Dafny error translation

commands.name: nightjar retry
commands.description: Force retry with CEGIS LLM repair loop

commands.name: nightjar lock
commands.description: Freeze dependencies into deps.lock with cryptographic hashes

exit_codes.5: Max retries exceeded — human escalation required

security_invariants.description: No shell execution with user-controlled input
All tool parameters validated against strict schema before use
No secrets or tokens present in tool output
No dynamic tool registration from external input
Dafny proof that validation gate is never bypassed
